info.name: IAM Service API
info.description:
Production-level Postman Collection for the IAM (Identity and Access Management) Service.

## Auth Flow
This service uses **cookie-based authentication** via an external IDP redirect.
1. Call `GET /redirect/{institution_id}?token=<IDP_TOKEN>` — the server sets an `access_token` HTTPOnly cookie.
2. The `access_token` cookie value is captured into the `accessToken` environment variable.
3. All protected requests send `Cookie: access_token={{accessToken}}` automatically via the request header.

The middleware checks: `c.Cookies("access_token")` (key: `access_token`).

## Write Tests Gate
Set `allowWriteTests=true` in the environment to enable POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE requests. Otherwise they are skipped safely.

## Seeder Fixtures
- University ID: `25d29d60-1cdc-4794-a510-68f87d24a284` (Universitas Pertamina)
- Seed User ID: `1bc3e3e5-3239-456b-a371-c1ee84b4291d` (SIAKUP Administrator)
- Seed Institution ID: `f9587424-a6e8-4f62-87db-37660e34463c` (General department)

exec: // Global pre-request: ensure accessToken is present for protected routes
console.warn('[PRE-REQUEST] accessToken is not set. Protected endpoints will return 401.');
console.warn('[PRE-REQUEST] Run the /redirect flow or set accessToken manually in the environment.');

item.name: Redirect (Auth)
item.description: IDP redirect flow. Calling this endpoint with a valid IDP token creates an `access_token` cookie. The middleware reads `c.Cookies("access_token")` — this value is captured into the `accessToken` env var for all subsequent authenticated requests.

request.description:
GET /redirect/{institution_id}?token=<IDP_TOKEN>

On success: 302 redirect to dashboard + sets `access_token` HTTPOnly cookie.
The test script captures the `access_token` cookie value into the `accessToken` env var.
Disable 'Automatically follow redirects' in Postman settings to capture the cookie before the 302 fires.

exec: console.warn('[REDIRECT] idpToken env var is not set. This request will fail with 400/403.');
console.warn('[REDIRECT] Obtain a token from the IDP and set it in the environment.');
// Capture the access_token cookie — this is what the middleware reads via c.Cookies('access_token')
console.log('[REDIRECT] access_token cookie captured and stored as accessToken env var.');
console.warn('[REDIRECT] access_token cookie not found in response. Check that Postman cookie jar is enabled for this domain.');
pm.test('403 means invalid IDP token', function () {

request.description: GET /redirect/{institution_id} with NO token query param. Expects 400.

exec: pm.test('Status code is 400 when token is missing', function () {

request.description: GET /redirect/{invalid_id} — Expects 400/403/404.

item.name: Roles
item.description: RBAC Roles management. All endpoints require authentication via `Cookie: access_token=<value>` and the `roles.manage.all.*` scope.
